issues.sample: CAR WOULDN'T STOP ON INCLINES WHEN RADAR SET AND OPERATIONAL.  DEALER COULD NOT CORRECT ISSUE. THIS HAS OCCURRED NUMEROUS TIMES NOW AND I AM ATTACHING TWO PHOTOS OF INTERSECTION OF INDIA HOOK RD AND CELANESE RD IN ROCK HILL ,SC WHERE UNIT DIDN'T FUNCTION.  UNIT ALSO HAS NOT WORKE

PURCHASED VEHICLE ON NOVEMBER 4TH, 2017.   IT IS NOW DECEMBER 1ST, 2017.    PROBLEMS SHORTLY FOLLOWED AFTER LEAVING DEALER. VEHICLE HESITATES, SHUDDERS, AND JERKS WHILE GAS ENGINE IS ENGAGED WHILE IN MOTION. ALSO, SOMETIMES ALMOST LOSES POWER WHILE IN MOTION USING THE GAS ENGINE.

AS I WAS DRIVING HOME FROM WORK, MY VEHICLE JERKED A COUPLE OF TIMES AND WAS SPEEDING UP AND SLOWING DOWN BY ITSELF. AS I WAS DRIVING THE CHECK ENGINE LIGHT APPEARED AND DID NOT GO AWAY AT ALL. ALTHOUGH, MY CAR WAS ACCELERATING AND SLOWING DOWN BY ITSELF, IT WAS STRUGGLING TO GO

TL* THE CONTACT OWNS A 2017 HYUNDAI IONIQ HYBRID. WITHIN LESS THAN 30 DAYS OF OWNING THE VEHICLE, THE CONTACT FELT NAUSEOUS. THE CONTACT GUESSED THAT THE ISSUE COULD BE ASSOCIATED WITH THE ELECTRICAL, ENGINE OR FUEL SYSTEM OR FUMES COULD BE EMITTING THROUGH THE VENTS. THE CONTACT

narrative.headline: What 2017 Hyundai Ioniq Hybrid owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 38 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Electrical System (32% of reports). Some reports involve a fire or crash — read the details below.
